Description: Complete authentication system including registration, login, OAuth, and account management
News feed, post creation, reactions, and content interaction
Comment system, nested replies, reactions on comments
Friend requests, suggestions, management, blocking
Profile pages, editing, privacy settings, activity history
Socket.io real-time events, notification bell, push notifications
Short video upload, feed, reactions, and discovery
Group creation, membership, group posts, admin tools
Buy/sell listings, categories, messaging sellers
Direct messages, group chats, real-time messaging
Account settings, privacy controls, notification preferences
CI/CD, deployment, environment config, monitoring
Live video streaming, event scheduling, RSVP
Global search, hashtags, trending, people discovery
As a new user, I can register with email and password. AC: form validation, Firebase Auth createUser, save profile to Firestore, redirect to feed
As a registered user, I receive a verification email. AC: Firebase sendEmailVerification, block login until verified, resend option
As a user, I can log in with email/password. AC: Firebase signInWithEmailAndPassword, token stored, redirect to feed
As a user, I can log in with Google. AC: Firebase GoogleAuthProvider, create Firestore profile if first login
As a user, I can reset my password via email. AC: Firebase sendPasswordResetEmail, success/error feedback
As a user, I can log out. AC: Firebase signOut, Zustand store cleared, redirect to login
Auth state persists on page reload. AC: Firebase onAuthStateChanged, authStore hydrated, protected routes work
Unauthenticated users redirected to login. AC: ProtectedRoute wrapper, redirects preserve intended destination
Backend verifies Firebase ID token on every protected endpoint. AC: middleware/auth.ts verifies token, attaches uid to req, returns 401 if invalid
Frontend auto-refreshes ID token before expiry. AC: token refreshed every 55 min, API calls use fresh token
Logged-in user can change password. AC: re-authenticate then updatePassword, success toast
User can update their email. AC: re-authenticate, updateEmail, re-verification sent
User can permanently delete account. AC: confirmation dialog, delete Firestore data, delete Firebase Auth user, sign out
Blocked users cannot interact. AC: blockedBy array in Firestore, middleware checks block status on friend/message endpoints
Add express-rate-limit to login and register routes. AC: max 10 req/15min per IP, returns 429 with message
GET /api/feed returns paginated posts from friends + self. AC: ordered by createdAt desc, limit 20, cursor pagination
Feed page renders PostCard list. AC: infinite scroll, loading skeleton, empty state
User can create a post with text only. AC: POST /api/posts, saves to Firestore, appears at top of feed
User can upload image(s) in post. AC: Cloudinary upload, imageUrls saved, images shown in PostCard
User can upload a video in post. AC: Cloudinary video upload, videoUrl saved, video player in PostCard
User sets post visibility: Public/Friends/Only Me. AC: privacy field saved, feed query filters by visibility
User can react to posts. AC: POST /api/posts/:id/react, reaction counts updated, toggling removes reaction
User can remove their reaction. AC: DELETE /api/posts/:id/react, count decremented
User can share a post. AC: POST /api/posts/:id/share, creates new post with sharedFrom ref, share count updated
User can delete their posts. AC: DELETE /api/posts/:id, Firestore doc deleted, media removed from Cloudinary
User can edit text of their post. AC: PATCH /api/posts/:id, edited flag shown on PostCard
Build PostCard UI: avatar, name, timestamp, content, media, reaction bar, comment/share counts
Build CreatePost UI: avatar, text area, media attach button, privacy picker, submit
Implement cursor-based pagination. AC: IntersectionObserver triggers load next page, no duplicate posts
User can tag friends in post. AC: TagFriendsModal searches friends, tags saved, tagged users notified
User can add location to post. AC: browser geolocation or manual input, location shown on PostCard
MomentsBar shows friend stories at top of feed. AC: horizontal scroll, add story button, story viewer modal
User can bookmark a post. AC: POST /api/posts/:id/save, saved posts accessible from profile
User can report a post. AC: report reason dropdown, saved to Firestore reports collection, toast confirmation
Posts ranked by recency + interaction score. AC: backend computes score, feed returns ranked list
User can pin one post to top of their profile. AC: PATCH /api/posts/:id/pin, profile feed shows pinned first
Track post views. AC: POST /api/posts/:id/view, viewCount shown on PostCard analytics
User can comment on a post. AC: POST /api/posts/:id/comments, comment appears instantly (optimistic)
Comments loaded below post. AC: GET /api/posts/:id/comments, paginated, ordered by createdAt
User can delete their comment. AC: DELETE /api/comments/:id, removed from UI instantly
User can edit their comment text. AC: PATCH /api/comments/:id, edited label shown
User can reply to a comment. AC: parentId field, replies nested under parent, expandable
User can like/react to a comment. AC: POST /api/comments/:id/react, count shown
PostCard shows total comment count. AC: count from Firestore aggregation, updates on new comment
User can @mention someone in comment. AC: autocomplete friends list, tagged user notified
Show first 3 comments, Load more button. AC: cursor pagination, smooth append
User can report a comment. AC: report saved, toast confirmation
User can send friend request. AC: POST /api/friends/requests, optimistic UI adds to Sent tab
User can cancel pending sent request. AC: DELETE /api/friends/requests/:id, removed from Sent tab instantly
User can accept incoming request. AC: PATCH /api/friends/requests/:id/accept, both users added to friends collection
User can reject incoming request. AC: DELETE /api/friends/requests/:id, removed from Received tab
User sees list of all friends. AC: GET /api/friends, paginated, shows avatar/name
User can unfriend someone. AC: DELETE /api/friends/:uid, removed from both users lists
Show suggested friends (FOAF - friends of friends). AC: GET /api/friends/suggestions, ranked by mutual count
Show mutual friend count on suggestion cards. AC: computed server-side, shown below name
Separate tab showing incoming requests. AC: GET /api/friends/requests, accept/reject actions
Separate tab showing sent requests. AC: GET /api/friends/sent, cancel action, optimistic update
Search bar filters friend list. AC: client-side filter by name, debounced
User can block another user. AC: POST /api/users/:uid/block, blocked user removed from search/suggestions
User can unblock. AC: DELETE /api/users/:uid/block, user reappears in search
Show friends with birthday today/this week. AC: query Firestore by birthday field, sorted by date
Show online/offline status on friend cards. AC: Socket.io presence via onlineUsers map
Navigation shows unread request count. AC: real-time badge updates via socket
User can view their own profile. AC: profile page shows avatar, cover, bio, friends count, posts
User can visit another user's profile. AC: route /profile/:uid, shows public info
User can edit name, bio, location, birthday, website. AC: PATCH /api/users/:uid/profile, Firestore updated
User can upload/change profile picture. AC: Cloudinary upload, avatarUrl saved in Firestore
User can upload cover photo. AC: Cloudinary upload, coverUrl saved
Profile page shows user's posts in chronological order. AC: GET /api/users/:uid/posts
Profile shows all photos from posts. AC: GET /api/users/:uid/media, grid layout
Profile shows user's friends list. AC: GET /api/friends/list/:uid, shows avatars + names
Show profile completeness %. AC: check required fields, progress bar shows what's missing
Public profiles can be followed without friending. AC: POST /api/users/:uid/follow, follower count shown
Control who sees posts/friends/photos. AC: privacySettings field, feed/profile queries respect settings
Profile shows posts user has saved/bookmarked. AC: GET /api/users/saved-posts, only visible to self
User can add work history and education. AC: workHistory[] and education[] arrays in Firestore
User sees their activity log (posts, reactions, comments). AC: paginated GET /api/users/activity
Initialize Socket.io on Express server. AC: CORS configured for client origin, JWT auth on connection
Frontend connects to socket server on login. AC: socket.ts connects with token, reconnects on auth change
Reaction counts update in real-time across clients. AC: server emits post:reacted event, feed updates count
New comments appear in real-time. AC: server emits comment:new event to users viewing the post
User is notified instantly when someone sends a request. AC: socket event friend:request, toast shown
Header shows bell icon with unread count badge. AC: clicking opens notification dropdown list
GET /api/notifications returns user notifications. AC: paginated, includes type/actor/entity/read status
PATCH /api/notifications/:id/read. AC: isRead set to true, badge count decremented
PATCH /api/notifications/read-all. AC: all isRead set to true, badge resets to 0
Track which users are online. AC: socket connect/disconnect updates onlineUsers map, friends see green dot
'New posts available' banner appears when friend posts. AC: socket event post:new, click to refresh feed
Browser push notifications via Firebase Cloud Messaging. AC: permission request, notifications received when tab not focused
Define notification types: friend_request, friend_accept, post_reaction, comment, mention, share. Stored in Firestore with icon mapping
Chat icon shows unread message count, updates in real-time. AC: badge matches /api/messages/unread-count
POST /api/videos endpoint. AC: Cloudinary video upload, metadata saved in Firestore
GET /api/videos returns paginated vertical video feed. AC: ordered by createdAt desc
Full-screen vertical video player. AC: auto-play on scroll into view, mute toggle, loop
Upload button opens file picker, shows progress bar, saves metadata.
POST /api/videos/:id/react. AC: heart animation, count updated
Comments panel slides up on video. AC: POST /api/videos/:id/comments, real-time updates
Share button copies link or shares to feed. AC: POST /api/videos/:id/share
Algorithm serves videos based on watch history and tags. AC: backend scoring, GET /api/videos/foryou
User can add hashtags to video. AC: tags[] saved, GET /api/videos?tag=x filter works
Track video views. AC: POST /api/videos/:id/view, viewCount shown below video
User can delete their video. AC: Cloudinary destroy + Firestore delete
Video has caption field shown below video. AC: text with hashtag/mention parsing
POST /api/groups. AC: name, description, cover image, public/private setting
GET /api/groups returns public groups. AC: search by name, filter by category
POST /api/groups/:id/join. AC: member added, notification to admin, pending if private
DELETE /api/groups/:id/leave. AC: removed from members list
Group has its own post feed. AC: POST/GET /api/groups/:id/posts, only members can post
GET /api/groups/:id/members. AC: list with roles (admin/moderator/member)
Admin can remove a member. AC: DELETE /api/groups/:id/members/:uid
Admin can edit group name/description/cover. AC: PATCH /api/groups/:id
Member can invite friends to group. AC: POST /api/groups/:id/invite, notification sent
Admin sees pending join requests. AC: GET /api/groups/:id/requests, approve/reject actions
Members notified of new posts in group. AC: notification created, bell shows new activity
Admin can upload group cover. AC: Cloudinary upload, coverUrl saved
User sees groups they belong to. AC: GET /api/groups/mine, card grid layout
POST /api/market. AC: title, price, description, category, images, location
GET /api/market returns paginated listings. AC: filter by category, location, price range
GET /api/market/:id returns full listing. AC: shows all images, seller info, condition
Seller can edit listing. AC: PATCH /api/market/:id, only owner can edit
Seller can delete listing. AC: DELETE /api/market/:id, images removed from Cloudinary
Seller marks item as sold. AC: PATCH /api/market/:id/sell, status=sold shown on card
'Message Seller' button opens DM chat. AC: creates conversation if none exists, navigates to chat
User can save a listing. AC: POST /api/market/:id/save, accessible from profile saved tab
Search listings by keyword. AC: GET /api/market?q=keyword, title/description indexed
Predefined categories: Electronics, Fashion, Vehicles, Property, etc. Seed data and filter UI
Seller uploads up to 5 images. AC: Cloudinary multi-upload, images array saved
User can report inappropriate listing. AC: report reason saved, toast confirmation
POST /api/conversations. AC: find-or-create conversation between 2 users
GET /api/conversations returns user's chats sorted by lastMessageAt. AC: shows avatar, name, last message preview
POST /api/conversations/:id/messages. AC: text message saved, socket emits to recipient
Messages appear instantly without refresh. AC: socket event message:new, conversation list reorders
Show 'Seen' when recipient reads message. AC: PATCH /api/messages/:id/read, socket emits read event

Show '...' when other user is typing. AC: socket event typing:start/stop, auto-clear after 3s
Nav shows unread message count. AC: badge from /api/conversations/unread-count, real-time via socket
User can delete sent message for themselves. AC: message hidden from their view
Create group chat with multiple users. AC: POST /api/conversations with participants[], group name
React to a message with emoji. AC: reactions array on message doc, shown below message
Search within a conversation. AC: GET /api/conversations/:id/messages?q=text
Settings page with sections: Account, Privacy, Notifications, Appearance. AC: sidebar navigation
User can toggle dark/light mode. AC: themeStore persists preference to localStorage, Tailwind dark class applied
User can enable/disable notification types. AC: notificationPrefs field in Firestore, backend checks before creating notification

Summary: [SET-4] Privacy - Who Can See Posts Default
Description: Set default post privacy. AC: defaultPostPrivacy field, CreatePost pre-selects this value

Summary: [SET-5] Privacy - Who Can Send Friend Requests
Description: Setting: Everyone / Friends of Friends only. AC: friend request API checks this setting

Summary: [SET-6] Privacy - Who Can See Friends List
Description: Profile privacy: public friends list vs hidden. AC: profile API respects privacySettings.friendsVisible
User can set UI language (EN/VI). AC: i18n store, all labels translated

Static help page with FAQ accordion and contact form. AC: contact form submits to backend email

All secrets in .env files. AC: .env in .gitignore, .env.example committed, serviceAccountKey.json in .gitignore

Deploy Express server. AC: environment variables set, health check endpoint /api/health responds 200
Deploy Vite app. AC: firebase deploy, custom domain configured
Auto deploy on merge to main. AC: lint → test → build → deploy pipeline
Set up Cloudinary account, upload presets, CORS. AC: unsigned upload preset, storage limits configured

Apply express-rate-limit globally and per route. AC: 100 req/15min general, stricter on auth routes
HTTP request logging and error logging. AC: Morgan logs requests, Winston logs errors with stack traces

Cloudinary auto-format and quality on all image URLs. AC: f_auto,q_auto transformations applied

Users RSVP to events. AC: POST /api/events/:id/rsvp, attendee count updated

Header search bar with autocomplete. AC: debounce 300ms, shows top 5 people results as dropdown
